sections.title: Step 1 — Needs Gathered
sections.content:
| Source | Count | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Step 06 (JTBD) | 27 | Market-level error statements ES-01 through ES-27 |
| Step 10 (FIT) | 8 | Product-related constraint needs PRN-01 through PRN-08 |
| **Total** | **35** | Merged per ODI Matrix merge rule |

Step 10 needs injected with `job_step_number=0`, `job_step_name="product_constraint"`, `impact_category="reliability"`, `product_related=true`.

---

sections.title: Step 2 — Satisfaction Recalibration
sections.content:
Recalibrated against 6 incumbent technologies from Step 03 (04_incumbents_home):

| Technology | Share | Key Strength | Key Weakness |
|---|---|---|---|
| Vortex (SIKA, Huba) | dominant >40% | No moving parts, bubble detection | Pressure drop, low-flow instability |
| Impeller / Turbine | significant 15-40% | Lowest cost, 30:1 turndown | Bearing wear, drift, clogging |
| Pump-Integrated Est. | significant 15-40% | Zero cost | ±10-20% accuracy, EU disqualified |
| Electromagnetic | niche 5-15% | Zero pressure drop, ±0.2% | 5-10x cost, physically larger |
| Differential Pressure | niche 5-15% | No electronics in flow | Permanent pressure loss, 4:1 turndown |
| Balance Valve Manual | emerging <5% | Dual-purpose | Spot-check only, no continuous output |

### Key Recalibrations

| ID | Original Sat | Recal. Sat | Direction | Reasoning |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ES-05 | 4.0 | 5.0 | +1.0 | Vortex (dominant) doesn't require acoustic calibration — avoids glycol config entirely |
| ES-07 | 4.0 | 3.5 | -0.5 | Vortex detects bubbles but NOT rapid empty-pipe detection <5s; most incumbents poor |
| ES-08 | 4.0 | 3.5 | -0.5 | No incumbent offers automated self-diagnostics at startup |
| ES-09 | 6.0 | 5.5 | -0.5 | Turbine installed base (15-40% share) drifts significantly; weighted average lower |
| ES-10 | 4.0 | 4.5 | +0.5 | Vortex bubble detection is a known strength; EM immune |
| ES-14 | 4.0 | 3.5 | -0.5 | Only EM (niche) detects direction; vortex/turbine/paddle all poor |
| ES-15 | 6.0 | 5.0 | -1.0 | Vortex has "moderate pressure drop" (known weakness); turbine also drops pressure |
| ES-16 | 5.0 | 4.5 | -0.5 | Vortex degrades at low flow (known weakness); pump estimation ±10-20% |
| ES-17 | 5.0 | 4.5 | -0.5 | No incumbent self-detects calibration drift |
| ES-19 | 5.0 | 4.5 | -0.5 | Vortex bluff body accumulates debris; turbine clogs from particles |
| ES-20 | 4.0 | 3.0 | -1.0 | No incumbent except ultrasonic offers combined flow+temp in single body |
| ES-23 | 5.0 | 5.5 | +0.5 | Vortex is genuinely stable — no moving parts, no calibration drift |
| ES-26 | 5.0 | 4.5 | -0.5 | Turbine drift + pump estimation disqualification = audit risk |
| PRN-01 | 6.0 | 7.0 | +1.0 | All major incumbents (vortex, EM, turbine) immune to acoustic coupling |
| PRN-05 | 4.0 | 5.0 | +1.0 | Vortex and EM largely unaffected by air bubbles |
| PRN-07 | 4.0 | 4.5 | +0.5 | EM measures full cross-section (immune); vortex less sensitive |
| PRN-08 | 5.0 | 5.5 | +0.5 | EM immune to speed-of-sound; vortex uses frequency (not SoS dependent) |

Needs not listed above: satisfaction unchanged from Step 06 / Step 10 original values.

---

sections.title: Step 3 — ODI Scores (Deterministic)
sections.content:
**Formula:** `opportunity_score = importance + max(importance - satisfaction, 0)`
**Underserved:** `importance > 7 AND satisfaction < 5`
**Overserved:** `importance < 3 AND satisfaction > 7`

### Market-Level Needs (Step 06)

| ID | Statement (abbreviated) | Step | Imp | Sat | Opp | Under | Over | Prod |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ES-07 | Detect empty-pipe/air-lock before compressor enable (<5s) | CONFIRM | 9.0 | 3.5 | **14.50** | **yes** | no | true |
| ES-16 | Prevent compressor short-cycling from undetected low-flow (>10s) | EXECUTE | 9.0 | 4.5 | **13.50** | **yes** | no | false |
| ES-20 | Compute real-time thermal energy (kW) via single-body flow+temp | MONITOR | 8.0 | 3.0 | **13.00** | **yes** | no | true |
| ES-09 | Maintain ±3% accuracy over 10,000 operating hours | EXECUTE | 9.0 | 5.5 | **12.50** | no | no | false |
| ES-06 | Auto-compensate for glycol concentration variations (<50%) | PREPARE | 8.0 | 4.0 | **12.00** | **yes** | no | false |
| ES-25 | Demonstrate EU EcoDesign compliance via traceable flow data | BRIDGE | 8.0 | 4.0 | **12.00** | **yes** | no | false |
| ES-10 | Prevent air entrainment >2% vol causing signal loss | EXECUTE | 8.0 | 4.5 | **11.50** | **yes** | no | true |
| ES-17 | Detect calibration drift >±0.5% within 30 days | MONITOR | 8.0 | 4.5 | **11.50** | **yes** | no | false |
| ES-26 | Prevent audit findings from flow measurement inaccuracy | BRIDGE | 8.0 | 4.5 | **11.50** | **yes** | no | false |
| ES-04 | Prevent incorrect orientation causing bias >2% | PREPARE | 8.0 | 5.0 | **11.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-11 | Measure accurately across full turndown range | EXECUTE | 8.0 | 5.0 | **11.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-21 | Prevent acoustic coupling degradation >1% error in 5yr | MONITOR | 8.0 | 5.0 | **11.00** | no | no | true |
| ES-27 | Minimize warranty callbacks from sensor malfunction (<24 mo) | BRIDGE | 8.0 | 5.0 | **11.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-08 | Verify sensor signal integrity via self-diagnostics at startup | CONFIRM | 7.0 | 3.5 | **10.50** | no | no | false |
| ES-14 | Detect and report reverse flow within 1 second | EXECUTE | 7.0 | 3.5 | **10.50** | no | no | true |
| ES-23 | No field recalibration within rated service life | MODIFY | 8.0 | 5.5 | **10.50** | no | no | false |
| ES-18 | Distinguish process deviations from sensor artifacts >95% | MONITOR | 7.0 | 4.0 | **10.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-22 | Recalibrate/replace sensor without draining circuit | MODIFY | 7.0 | 4.0 | **10.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-19 | Prevent scale/sediment degrading accuracy >2% in service life | MONITOR | 7.0 | 4.5 | **9.50** | no | no | false |
| ES-01 | Prevent turndown ratio mismatch for part-load to full-load | DEFINE | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-03 | Assembly integration <3 minutes per unit | PREPARE | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-05 | Minimize glycol acoustic property configuration effort | PREPARE | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no | true |
| ES-13 | Prevent temperature transient measurement error >1% (>30s) | EXECUTE | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no | true |
| ES-15 | Pressure drop contribution <50 mbar at design flow | EXECUTE | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-24 | Remote sensor health diagnostics via BMS bus | MODIFY | 6.0 | 3.0 | **9.00** | no | no | false |
| ES-02 | Single sensor platform across DN12-DN25 | DEFINE | 6.0 | 4.0 | **8.00** | no | no | true |
| ES-12 | Prevent pump pulsation causing >5% flow oscillation | EXECUTE | 6.0 | 5.0 | **7.00** | no | no | false |

### Product-Related Needs (Step 10)

| ID | Statement (abbreviated) | Source Constraint | Imp | Sat | Opp | Under | Over |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| PRN-05 | Ultrasonic signal attenuation from air entrainment >2% vol | Air Bubble Tolerance | 8.0 | 5.0 | **11.00** | no | no |
| PRN-04 | Signal loss below ultrasonic transit-time noise floor at part-load | Minimum Flow Rate Detection | 7.0 | 5.0 | **9.00** | no | no |
| PRN-07 | Accuracy sensitivity to asymmetric flow profiles in compact enclosures | Minimum Straight Pipe Run | 7.0 | 4.5 | **9.50** | no | no |
| PRN-08 | Transit-time error from rapid speed-of-sound changes | Temperature-Dependent Accuracy | 7.0 | 5.5 | **8.50** | no | no |
| PRN-06 | Measurement loss from partially filled pipes | Pipe Full Condition | 6.0 | 5.0 | **7.00** | no | no |
| PRN-02 | Polymer housing degradation near 90°C thermal limit | Maximum Medium Temperature | 5.0 | 5.0 | **5.00** | no | no |
| PRN-03 | Housing failure from pressure spikes >10 bar | Maximum Operating Pressure | 5.0 | 6.0 | **5.00** | no | no |
| PRN-01 | Acoustic impedance mismatch from non-aqueous contaminants | Media Limitation | 4.0 | 7.0 | **4.00** | no | no |

---

sections.title: Step 4 — Market ODI Summary
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Market** | Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment |
| **NAICS** | 333415 |
| **Total Needs** | 35 |
| **Underserved Count** | 8 |
| **Overserved Count** | 0 |
| **Avg Opportunity Score** | 9.86 |

### Top 5 Opportunities

| Rank | ID | Statement | Opp | Zone |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | ES-07 | Minimize the time to detect an empty-pipe or air-lock condition before enabling the compressor to under 5 seconds | 14.50 | Underserved |
| 2 | ES-16 | Minimize the likelihood of compressor short-cycling due to undetected low-flow conditions persisting longer than 10 seconds | 13.50 | Underserved |
| 3 | ES-20 | Increase the ability to compute real-time thermal energy output (kW) by combining volumetric flow and temperature delta within a single sensor body | 13.00 | Underserved |
| 4 | ES-09 | Increase the ability to maintain measurement accuracy within ±3% of reading over 10,000 operating hours of steady-state operation | 12.50 | Underserved |
| 5 | ES-06 | Increase the ability to automatically compensate for glycol concentration variations up to 50% without manual reconfiguration | 12.00 | Underserved |

### Opportunity Zone Distribution

| Zone | Score Range | Count | % |
|---|---|---|---|
| Highly Underserved | >15 | 0 | 0% |
| Underserved | 12–15 | 6 | 17% |
| Appropriately Served | 10–12 | 14 | 40% |
| Overserved | <10 | 15 | 43% |

---

sections.title: Step 5 — Cross-Check vs Feature-Market Fit
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| ODI avg opportunity score | 9.86 |
| Feature-Fit avg overall score (Step 09) | 5.11 |
| Threshold: ODI avg > 12 AND Feature-Fit avg < 4 | NOT triggered |
| Threshold: ODI avg < 8 AND Feature-Fit avg > 7 | NOT triggered |
| **Result** | **No inconsistencies detected** |

### Top Underserved Needs vs Feature Alignment

| Underserved Need | Opp | Addressing Feature | Feature Fit | Alignment |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ES-07 Empty-pipe detection | 14.50 | Digital Anomaly Detection | 6.67 | Strong — highest-fit feature addresses highest-opp need |
| ES-16 Low-flow / short-cycling | 13.50 | Transit-Time Flow Measurement | 5.00 | Moderate — core FP covers this but accuracy at low flow is a challenge |
| ES-20 Single-body kW calculation | 13.00 | Integrated Temperature Sensing | 5.67 | Strong — unique capability; no incumbent matches |
| ES-06 Glycol auto-compensation | 12.00 | Real-Time Compensation Algorithms | 4.56 | Moderate — addresses need but vortex avoids it entirely |
| ES-25 EU EcoDesign compliance | 12.00 | Transit-Time Flow Measurement + Integrated Temp | 5.00/5.67 | Strong — combined flow+temp enables heat metering compliance |

---

sections.title: QA Checklist
sections.content:
| # | Check | Pass Condition | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Formula correct | Spot-check 5 entries match `opp = imp + max(imp - sat, 0)` | **PASS** — ES-07: 9+max(9-3.5,0)=14.5; ES-16: 9+max(9-4.5,0)=13.5; ES-20: 8+max(8-3,0)=13; PRN-01: 4+max(4-7,0)=4; ES-12: 6+max(6-5,0)=7 |
| Q2 | Underserved flags correct | Every entry with imp>7 AND sat<5 has is_underserved=true | **PASS** — 8 entries flagged; verified all 8 meet criteria |
| Q3 | Overserved flags correct | Every entry with imp<3 AND sat>7 has is_overserved=true | **PASS** — 0 entries; no entry has imp<3 AND sat>7 |
| Q4 | Need count preserved | Total entries ≥ Step 06 count (27) + Step 10 applicable (8) | **PASS** — 35 = 27 + 8 |
| Q5 | Top-5 ordering correct | Sorted by descending opportunity_score | **PASS** — 14.5 > 13.5 > 13.0 > 12.5 > 12.0 |
| Q6 | Cross-check ran | ODI vs Feature-Fit inconsistencies checked | **PASS** — no inconsistencies detected |

---

sections.title: Sources
sections.content:
- [SRC: JTBD_air_conditioning_and_warm_air_heating_eq] — 27 error statements (Step 06), importance and satisfaction scores, job map
- [SRC: FIT_air_conditioning_and_warm_air_heating_eq] — 8 product-related needs (Step 10), feature-market fit scores (Step 09)
- [SRC: 04_incumbents_home] — 6 incumbent technology profiles with strengths, weaknesses, market share
- [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] — Product constraints feeding PRN needs
- [SRC: 02_functional_promise] — Commodity FP, product FP

rows.Description: Market-level error statements ES-01 through ES-27
Product-related constraint needs PRN-01 through PRN-08
Merged per ODI Matrix merge rule

rows.Reasoning: Vortex (dominant) doesn't require acoustic calibration — avoids glycol config entirely
Vortex detects bubbles but NOT rapid empty-pipe detection <5s; most incumbents poor
No incumbent offers automated self-diagnostics at startup
Turbine installed base (15-40% share) drifts significantly; weighted average lower
Vortex bubble detection is a known strength; EM immune
Only EM (niche) detects direction; vortex/turbine/paddle all poor
Vortex has "moderate pressure drop" (known weakness); turbine also drops pressure
Vortex degrades at low flow (known weakness); pump estimation ±10-20%
Vortex bluff body accumulates debris; turbine clogs from particles
No incumbent except ultrasonic offers combined flow+temp in single body
Vortex is genuinely stable — no moving parts, no calibration drift
Turbine drift + pump estimation disqualification = audit risk
All major incumbents (vortex, EM, turbine) immune to acoustic coupling
Vortex and EM largely unaffected by air bubbles
EM measures full cross-section (immune); vortex less sensitive
EM immune to speed-of-sound; vortex uses frequency (not SoS dependent)

rows.Statement (abbreviated): Detect empty-pipe/air-lock before compressor enable (<5s)
Prevent compressor short-cycling from undetected low-flow (>10s)
Compute real-time thermal energy (kW) via single-body flow+temp
Maintain ±3% accuracy over 10,000 operating hours
Auto-compensate for glycol concentration variations (<50%)
Demonstrate EU EcoDesign compliance via traceable flow data
Prevent air entrainment >2% vol causing signal loss
Detect calibration drift >±0.5% within 30 days
Prevent audit findings from flow measurement inaccuracy
Prevent incorrect orientation causing bias >2%
Measure accurately across full turndown range
Prevent acoustic coupling degradation >1% error in 5yr
Minimize warranty callbacks from sensor malfunction (<24 mo)
Verify sensor signal integrity via self-diagnostics at startup
Detect and report reverse flow within 1 second
No field recalibration within rated service life
Distinguish process deviations from sensor artifacts >95%
Recalibrate/replace sensor without draining circuit
Prevent scale/sediment degrading accuracy >2% in service life
Prevent turndown ratio mismatch for part-load to full-load
Assembly integration <3 minutes per unit
Minimize glycol acoustic property configuration effort
Prevent temperature transient measurement error >1% (>30s)
Pressure drop contribution <50 mbar at design flow
Remote sensor health diagnostics via BMS bus
Single sensor platform across DN12-DN25
Prevent pump pulsation causing >5% flow oscillation
Ultrasonic signal attenuation from air entrainment >2% vol
Signal loss below ultrasonic transit-time noise floor at part-load
Accuracy sensitivity to asymmetric flow profiles in compact enclosures
Transit-time error from rapid speed-of-sound changes
Measurement loss from partially filled pipes
Polymer housing degradation near 90°C thermal limit
Housing failure from pressure spikes >10 bar
Acoustic impedance mismatch from non-aqueous contaminants

rows.Value: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment

rows.Statement: Minimize the time to detect an empty-pipe or air-lock condition before enabling the compressor to under 5 seconds
Minimize the likelihood of compressor short-cycling due to undetected low-flow conditions persisting longer than 10 seconds
Increase the ability to compute real-time thermal energy output (kW) by combining volumetric flow and temperature delta within a single sensor body
Increase the ability to maintain measurement accuracy within ±3% of reading over 10,000 operating hours of steady-state operation
Increase the ability to automatically compensate for glycol concentration variations up to 50% without manual reconfiguration

rows.Metric: Threshold: ODI avg > 12 AND Feature-Fit avg < 4
Threshold: ODI avg < 8 AND Feature-Fit avg > 7

rows.Alignment: Strong — highest-fit feature addresses highest-opp need
Moderate — core FP covers this but accuracy at low flow is a challenge
Strong — unique capability; no incumbent matches
Moderate — addresses need but vortex avoids it entirely
Strong — combined flow+temp enables heat metering compliance

entities.naics_title: Air-Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment and Commercial and Industrial Refrigeration Equipment Manufacturing
entities.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment

entries.error_statement: Minimize the time to detect an empty-pipe or air-lock condition before enabling the compressor to under 5 seconds
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex detects bubbles but NOT rapid empty-pipe in <5s; most incumbents poor at this specific capability

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of compressor short-cycling due to undetected low-flow conditions persisting longer than 10 seconds
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex degrades at low flow (known weakness); pump estimation ±10-20% misses low-flow events

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to compute real-time thermal energy output (kW) by combining volumetric flow and temperature delta within a single sensor body
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: No incumbent except ultrasonic offers combined flow+temp in single body; vortex, turbine, EM all require separate temp probe

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to maintain measurement accuracy within ±3% of reading over 10,000 operating hours of steady-state operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Turbine installed base (15-40% share) drifts significantly over time; weighted average satisfaction lower

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to automatically compensate for glycol concentration variations up to 50% without manual reconfiguration
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex has moderate fluid property sensitivity; turbine affected by viscosity; mixed picture

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to demonstrate EU EcoDesign energy efficiency compliance through traceable, sensor-based flow measurement data
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — pump estimation EU-disqualified; balance valve spot-check only; dedicated sensors can provide data but traceability gaps remain

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of air entrainment exceeding 2% by volume causing complete measurement signal loss during thermal cycling
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex (dominant) has bubble detection as a known strength; EM immune to air entrainment

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to detect calibration drift exceeding ±0.5% within 30 days of occurrence over 12 months of continuous operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: No incumbent self-detects calibration drift; turbine drifts silently; vortex is stable but lacks drift alerting

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of field audit findings revealing flow measurement inaccuracy that would cause energy label downgrade
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Turbine drift + pump estimation disqualification creates audit risk across significant installed base

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of incorrect sensor orientation during installation causing flow measurement bias exceeding 2% of reading
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — all inline sensors have orientation sensitivity; no incumbent advantage

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to measure flow rate accurately across the full turndown range from minimum to maximum system load
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex limited at low flow, turbine has 30:1 turndown; mixed picture

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of acoustic coupling degradation between transducer and fluid causing measurement error exceeding 1% within the first 5 years of operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — technology-specific to ultrasonic; incumbent ultrasonic share (35%) sets baseline

entries.error_statement: Minimize the frequency of warranty callbacks attributed to flow sensor malfunction within the first 24 months of equipment operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex (dominant) is reliable; turbine drives most callbacks but declining share

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of ultrasonic signal attenuation from air entrainment exceeding 2% by volume during thermal cycling or system startup
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex and EM largely unaffected by air bubbles; dominant incumbents handle this better than ultrasonic

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to verify sensor signal integrity through automated self-diagnostics at each system startup
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: No incumbent offers automated self-diagnostics at startup; degraded sensors operate undetected

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to detect and report reverse flow direction to the system controller within 1 second of flow reversal
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Only EM (niche 5-15%) detects direction; vortex/turbine/paddle all poor at directional sensing

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of requiring field recalibration more frequently than once within the rated equipment service life
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex (dominant) is genuinely stable — no moving parts, minimal calibration drift over service life

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to distinguish genuine process deviations from sensor artifacts with >95% classification accuracy
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — most incumbents lack diagnostic sophistication

entries.error_statement: Minimize the time required to recalibrate or replace a degraded flow sensor without draining the hydronic circuit
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — all inline sensors require system shutdown for replacement

entries.error_statement: Minimize the sensitivity of transit-time measurement accuracy to asymmetric flow profiles from elbows, valves, or tees in compact equipment enclosures
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: EM measures full cross-section (immune to flow profile); vortex less sensitive to asymmetry

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of scale or sediment buildup degrading measurement accuracy by more than 2% within the sensor's rated service life
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex bluff body accumulates debris (known weakness); turbine clogs from particles and sediment

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of selecting a flow sensor with insufficient turndown ratio for the system's part-load to full-load operating range
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — mixed picture: vortex limited at low flow, turbine has 30:1 turndown

entries.error_statement: Minimize the time required to mechanically integrate the flow sensor into the hydronic circuit during OEM assembly to under 3 minutes per unit
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — all inline sensors install similarly

entries.error_statement: Minimize the commissioning effort required to configure fluid acoustic properties for varying water-glycol concentrations
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex (dominant) doesn't require acoustic calibration — avoids glycol configuration entirely

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of rapid temperature transients exceeding compensation algorithm response, causing measurement error >1% for more than 30 seconds
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex has some temperature sensitivity; EM immune; mixed

entries.error_statement: Minimize the flow sensor's contribution to system pressure drop below 50 mbar at design flow rate
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Vortex has 'moderate pressure drop' (known weakness); turbine also creates pressure drop; only EM has zero

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of measurement signal loss when system flow rate falls below the ultrasonic transit-time noise floor during part-load VFD operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex also struggles at low flow; turbine has good low-flow range; mixed

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to remotely diagnose flow sensor health status via the existing BMS communication bus without physical inspection
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — most legacy sensors lack remote diagnostics

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of transit-time measurement error from rapid speed-of-sound changes during heating-cooling mode transitions exceeding compensation algorithm response time
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: EM immune to speed-of-sound changes; vortex uses frequency not SoS — dominant incumbents less affected

entries.error_statement: Increase the ability to specify a single sensor platform across multiple pipe diameters (DN12-DN25) without redesigning the hydraulic assembly
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — SIKA vortex offers VVX15/20/25 but unclear if shared electronics platform

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of circulation pump pressure pulsations causing flow reading oscillations exceeding 5% of steady-state value
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — all sensor types somewhat affected by pump pulsations

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of complete measurement loss from partially filled pipe sections during system charging, maintenance drain-down, or gravity-return operation
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex and turbine also require full pipe; EM recovers faster but niche share

entries.error_statement: Minimize the risk of polymer housing and seal degradation from sustained operation near the 90°C thermal limit in high-temperature heating configurations
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — vortex (SIKA) also uses plastic housing; EM uses metal; mixed

entries.error_statement: Minimize the risk of sensor housing failure from pressure spikes exceeding 10 bar continuous rating during water hammer or pump surge events
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: Unchanged — EM has higher pressure rating (metal housing) but vortex similar to ultrasonic

entries.error_statement: Minimize the likelihood of measurement failure from acoustic impedance mismatch when non-aqueous contaminants enter the hydronic circuit
entries.market_name: Air Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment
entries.recalibration_reason: All major incumbents (vortex, EM, turbine) immune to acoustic coupling issues; market well-served
